ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Tractatus De Vinea, Vindemia, Et Vino
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Prosperi Rendellae Monopolitani. Academici Sileni Nuncupati
ItacWorkItem.Subjects: Treatise on vineyard, grape harvest and wine
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Wanting titlepage (Venice, 1629?). On p. 43 the author mentions various Sileni academicians.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
